sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88305" key="proph/dhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπήδ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88305.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">protrusion,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀφθαλμῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n88305.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dislocation,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκπάλεια</ref></xr>, Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
